sections.paragraph:
Original: צמרי

Transliteration: tsemârı̂y

Phonetic: tsem-aw-ree'

BDB Definition:

Zemarite = see Zemaraim " double woolens"
  1. one of the Hamite tribes descended from Canaan and inhabitants of an unknown Canaanite city

Origin: from an unused name of a place in Palestine

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
